acceptance_checks.evidence: AHO_ITERATION=0.2.15 set before emit_workstream_start. Event logged at 2026-04-20T00:24:39Z with iteration=0.2.15.
Checkpoint shows current_workstream=W2, W2=in_progress. W0=workstream_complete, W1=workstream_complete preserved.

acceptance_checks.check: Model-family stop tokens dispatched per family
acceptance_checks.evidence: MODEL_FAMILY_CONFIG registry with 4 families: qwen (endoftext/im_end), llama3 (eot_id/end_of_text), glm (endoftext/end_of_box), nemotron (endoftext/im_end). Tests TestFamilyStopTokens 4/4 pass. Payload inspection confirms correct tokens per model.

<|end_of_box|> added as GLM stop token. _postprocess_response strips <|begin_of_box|> prefix. Tests TestGLMConfig::test_glm_strips_begin_box_prefix passes. Confirmed via W1 R11-diagnostic.json probe 4 methodology.
GLM family config sets num_gpu=30. TestGLMConfig::test_glm_num_gpu_30 passes. Payload options include num_gpu=30 for GLM models.
Qwen family config sets num_predict=2000. TestQwenConfig::test_qwen_num_predict_2000 passes. Other families do not set num_predict.

Five specific exception types: DispatchError, MalformedResponseError, TemplateLeakError, ModelUnavailableError, DispatchTimeoutError. Error handling catches urllib.error.HTTPError, urllib.error.URLError, TimeoutError, OSError, json.JSONDecodeError, ValueError — all specific types.

Configurable max_retries (default 2) with exponential backoff (base * 2^(attempt-1)). Retries on connection errors and timeouts. No retry on template leak (systemic), 404 (permanent), or malformed response. Tests TestRetryBackoff 3/3 pass.
timeout parameter passed through to urllib.request.urlopen. Caller controls per-stage timeout. DispatchTimeoutError raised on exhaustion when raise_on_error=True.
unload_model() sends keep_alive=0. list_loaded_models() queries /api/ps. ensure_model_ready() evicts specified models then probes target. Tests TestModelManagement 3/3 pass.
_validate_num_ctx clamps to [256, 262144]. ValueError on non-positive or non-integer. Tests TestParameterValidation 6/6 pass.

acceptance_checks.check: Template leak detection on post-processed output
acceptance_checks.evidence: _check_template_leak scans for 8 known template tokens. Template leak sets error but returns content (for inspection). No retry on leak. Tests TestTemplateLeak 5/5 pass.
STOP_TOKENS and DEFAULT_NUM_CTX module constants still exist. All 6 existing test_dispatcher_chat_api.py tests pass. dispatch() signature backward compatible (new params have defaults).

acceptance_checks.check: Unit tests cover all hardening concerns
acceptance_checks.evidence: 46 new tests in test_dispatcher_hardening.py across 12 test classes. Plus 6 existing tests. Total: 52 dispatcher tests, all passing.

10 failed, 351 passed, 1 skipped (650.93s). W1 baseline: 11 failed, 304 passed. Delta: one fewer failure, 47 more passes (46 new W2 tests + 1 resolved). No new failures introduced. All 10 failures are pre-existing in test-baseline.json.
dispatcher-hardening-notes.md written with 8 design decisions (D1-D8), evidence references, tradeoffs, and test coverage table.
find + rm -rf __pycache__ executed after dispatcher.py write.
No cross-project references. All model family configs derived from aho W0 vetting probes and W1 fitness report. Stop tokens from model-specific documentation. No kjtcom constructs.

findings.description: Nemotron stop tokens assumed ChatML-compatible (same as Qwen). W0 probe showed no template leakage with Qwen stops. If Nemotron has native stop tokens that differ, W3/W4 testing will surface this.
Unknown model family falls back to Qwen config. This is safe (ChatML is widely compatible) but verbose — unrecognized models won't have optimized stop tokens.
Template leak detection is post-hoc — it fires after receiving the full response. For streaming dispatch (future), leak detection would need per-chunk scanning.

cross_project_contamination.notes: All stop tokens and model configs derived from aho-native W0/W1 evidence artifacts.
